title: SSBM Fountain of Dreams on Mario Paint Composer
description:
Happy Valentines day to all my subscribers and fans!

I'm sorry I haven't submitted a new Mario Paint Composer song in a while, and I hope this makes up for it. It's one of my favorite songs from one of my favorite games.

The thing about this song is though I felt it wasn't the best because of so few instruments at my disposal and especially the lack of held out notes. Still it passed my judgement (unlike some other songs) and I've uploaded it for you all to enjoy.

I really do love reading your comments and I read every single one on all of my videos so please give me feedback!

Oh, and before anyone asks this took about 3 hours total.

Software used:
Music: Mario Paint Composer - http://www.unfungames.com/mariopaint/

Notation: MidiNotate Player - http://www.notation.com/MidiNotatePlayer.htm

Video: Camstudio 2.0 - http://camstudio.org/

Editing: Windows Movie Maker

All free, legal, and unlimited.
